name: .NET Decompiler
description: Decompile a .NET / CLR assembly (IL) back to C# with the ilspycmd dotnet tool. Static: reads metadata + IL, never runs the assembly. Prereq-gated on ilspycmd (needs the .NET runtime); honest blind spot with an install hint when absent. Pair with dotnet-analyze for the P/Invoke surface.

prerequisites.install_hint: dotnet tool install -g ilspycmd  (needs the .NET SDK/runtime)

safety.notes: Trusted decompiler (ilspycmd) over an untrusted assembly. Reads IL/metadata and emits C#; never loads the assembly into a CLR or runs it. Timeout-bounded.

payload.note: BYO tool on PATH (needs the .NET runtime, not bundled). The runner invokes ilspycmd; the dispatcher prereq gate gives honest degradation. Complements dotnet-analyze (static triage → this for full C#).
